title: pelargonium × paternum
intro: Pelargonium × paternum, also known as the rose-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × paternum include relief from digestive problems, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation. The herbal preparations of this plant include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
